project_name: Coffee Shop Point of Sale (POS) System
problem_statement: The existing manual sales process for a coffee shop is inefficient, prone to errors in sales calculation, and lacks systematic tracking for daily sales performance. This leads to difficulties in managing inventory, analyzing sales trends, and making informed business decisions.
solution_overview: Develop a Point of Sale (POS) system tailored for coffee shops. The system will feature a user-friendly sales interface for storefront operations, automate sales calculations, and generate essential daily sales reports to provide insights into business performance.
functional_requirements: Develop a intuitive sales interface for processing customer orders at the storefront.
Implement automatic calculation of order totals, including item prices, discounts (if any), and taxes.
Enable the generation of daily sales reports, detailing total revenue, popular items, and transaction counts.
Allow for product management, including adding, updating, and deleting coffee items and other products with their prices.
Support various payment methods (e.g., cash, credit/debit card, mobile payments).
Provide basic user management for staff roles (e.g., cashier, manager).
Integrate order processing capabilities, including order placement, modification, and cancellation.
non_functional_requirements: The system must be highly reliable and available during business operating hours.
The sales interface should be user-friendly and require minimal training for staff.
Sales calculations must be accurate and perform quickly to avoid customer delays.
Ensure data security for sales transactions and customer information.
The system should be scalable to handle increasing sales volumes and potential future feature expansions.
Provide robust data backup and recovery mechanisms.
tech_stack_recommendation: Frontend: React.js / Vue.js (for web-based POS) or Electron (for desktop application)
Backend: Node.js with Express.js / Python with Django or Flask / C# with .NET Core
Database: PostgreSQL / MySQL (for transactional data management)
Cloud Platform: AWS / Google Cloud Platform / Microsoft Azure (for hosting and scalability)
Payment Gateway Integration: Stripe / PayPal API
